title: TurboQuant Explained..
summary: TurboQuant is a quantization technique from Google that applies vector quantization to KV cache in large language models. The method uses codebooks and optimization via mean squared error and inner product error to compress key-value caches, reducing VRAM requirements and GPU memory needs.
